headline: Is NIKE, Inc. (NKE) Stock A Good Buy Right Now?
summary: Is NKE a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on NIKE, Inc. on Rebound Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NKE. NIKE, Inc.’s share was trading at $62.18 as of February 27th. NKE’s trailing and forward P/E were 36.36 and 25.06 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Nike, […]

headline: Nike Faces China Recovery as Key Growth Driver, RBC Says
summary: Nike (NKE) is positioned to return to growth over the next one to two years, with recovery in China

headline: North America Golf Apparel Market Report 2025-2033 by Product, Distribution Channel, and Company Analysis
summary: The North American Golf Apparel Market is projected to surge from US$ 2.65 billion in 2025 to US$ 3.80 billion by 2033, growing at a 4.63% CAGR. This growth is propelled by increased golf participation, athleisure trends, and advancements in performance textiles. Key drivers include rising investments in golf facilities and enhanced consumer demand for stylish, high-quality apparel. Leading brands, including Nike, Under Armour, and Adidas, are innovating with sustainable materials and fabric tec

headline: Celebrate Academy Sports + Outdoors Run Month with Exclusive Deals, Promotions and Gifts for Runners of All Experience Levels
summary: Academy Sports + Outdoors ("Academy" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: ASO) announced today that during Academy Run Month, a month‑long celebration taking place Sunday, March 1, through Tuesday, March 31, it will equip runners of all experience levels with brand-forward deals, exclusive online offers, and in‑store fit clinics to help runners put their best foot forward.
